# Back to the Future 2026

> Official bilingual website for a two-day business and AI experience organized by Torrenegra & Co during SF Tech Week 2026.

## Canonical pages

- [Spanish event page](/es)
- [English event page](/en)

## Direct facts

- Name: Back to the Future 2026
- Dates: October 8-9, 2026
- Region: San Francisco Bay Area and Napa Valley, California
- Organizer: [Torrenegra & Co](https://www.torrenegra.com)
- Contact: hola@torrenegra.com
- Format: Two connected, independently purchasable experiences

## October 8: Summit

The Summit is a small business and technology gathering for founders, CEOs and leaders across SMBs, startups, scaleups, government and corporations. It combines practical cases, direct conversations and access to people building and operating with AI. Capacity is limited to 50 participants. Initial access starts at USD 899 per person.

## October 9: Executive Go & See

The Executive Go & See is an in-person peer-learning experience developed in collaboration with OpenAI. Corporate VPs, managers and C-level leaders visit and learn from organizations that have already brought AI into their operations. Capacity is limited to 20 executives. Initial access starts at USD 5,000 per person.

## Complete experience

The Summit and Executive Go & See can be purchased separately or together. Combined access includes both days, relevant introductions and one personalized 60-minute session.

## Important status

The people displayed on the website are proposed speakers. Participation is announced only after confirmation. Host companies and the complete agenda will also be published after confirmation.

## Access

Participation is limited. Visitors can review pricing phases and request access from the official Spanish or English page.
